title: 24:28 芒聙聰 August 13, 2024
body_text:
24:28 芒聙聰 August 13, 2024
Update to the Wires Part
We updated the Wires Part to reflect fields added to support the Wires
EFTR Data Extract changes
. Related forms were also updated. We also made a few other minor changes to the Part.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 15.4, Completing the Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171
Updated the form descriptions and images to reflect changes in the form.
Section 16.7, Completing the Sender Section
Updated an image to reflect the new 芒聙聹What is the 3rd Party芒聙聶s relationship to the account holder?芒聙聺 field added to the Sender 3rd Party section in Wires.
Removed the following comment: 芒聙聹Note: If the sender or third party芒聙聶s country of residence is listed as prohibited country, an error message displays after selecting 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺, and the wire won芒聙聶t be permitted to proceed.芒聙聺 The Wires application only provides a warning in this circumstance, it doesn芒聙聶t prevent the wire from proceeding.
Section 16.8, Completing the Beneficiary Section
Updated an image to reflect the new 芒聙聹What is the 3rd Party芒聙聶s relationship to the account holder?芒聙聺 field added to the Beneficiary 3rd Party section in Wires.
Added the following note: 芒聙聹Wires also validates that the IBAN contains a valid check digit.芒聙聺
Removed the following comment: 芒聙聹Note: If the beneficiary芒聙聶s country of residence is listed as prohibited country, an error message displays after selecting 芒聙聹Next芒聙聺, and the wire won芒聙聶t be permitted to proceed.芒聙聺 The Wires application only provides a warning in this circumstance, it doesn芒聙聶t prevent the wire from proceeding.
Section 16.10, Completing the Regulatory Section
Added content related to the new fields added to the Regulatory section that asks: 芒聙聹Were the funds collected by another person or entity?芒聙聺 If the user selects 芒聙聹Yes芒聙聺 they must enter the individual芒聙聶s or entity芒聙聶s details.
Section 22.2, Approving Outgoing Wires
Added a note that the 芒聙聹Source System芒聙聺 field indicates the system that the wire was created in.
Section, 27.3, Creating Outgoing Wires in a Contingency Situation
Updated the form descriptions and images to reflect changes in the form.
Section 29.1, Overview of Using MDB / Forge Commercial to Create Wires
Added a note that Wires are monitored in Central 1芒聙聶s Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) system. Outgoing wires that are alerted as potential fraud are managed in EFM.
Section 29.10, Processing MDB / Forge Commercial Wires in the Wires Application
Added a note that Wires are monitored in Central 1芒聙聶s Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) system. Outgoing wires that are alerted as potential fraud are managed in EFM.
Document Library
Status
Outgoing Wire Request
1171
We added fields to capture the following information:
Future date
Wire priority
Sender customer type
Customer number
Source of funds
Face-to-face transaction
Beneficiary customer type
Additional information field in the FINTRAC section to capture additional information for the sender and beneficiary as required
Third-party relationship of the sender/beneficiary to the account holder
Revised
Contingency Outgoing Wire Request
1799
We added fields to capture the following information:
Sender customer type
Customer number
Source of funds
Face-to-face transaction
Beneficiary customer type
Additional information field in the FINTRAC section to capture additional information for the sender and beneficiary as required
Third-party relationship of the sender/beneficiary to the account holder
Revised
